Voice2Prompt

On-device voice dictation — nothing leaves your Mac.

Status

Stopped
—

Permissions

checking…
Grant microphone access to dictate.
checking…
Grant it, then relaunch Voice2Prompt.
checking…
Grant it, then relaunch Voice2Prompt.

Settings

Hold Fn to talk; double-tap Fn to keep recording hands-free (tap Fn again to stop). Set System Settings → Keyboard → “Press 🌐 key to” = Do Nothing to avoid the emoji picker.
Non-English languages need a multilingual whisper model (e.g. ggml-base.bin).

Custom dictionary

Whole-word, case-insensitive replacement applied to every transcript.

Recent

Dictate something to see it here.

Welcome to Voice2Prompt 👋

1. Grant Accessibility so text can be inserted where you type.

2. Pick your push-to-talk hotkey (default Ctrl+Option+Space).

3. Press Start dictation, then hold the hotkey and speak.
